title: EDEN wire — submit request
description: Request body for POST /v0/experiments/{E}/tasks/{T}/submit. The `payload` shape depends on the claimed task's kind and follows the role submission schemas in 03-roles.md §§2.4, 3.4, 4.4. See 07-wire-protocol.md §2.4.

payload.description: Role-specific submission payload. Shape pinned by 03-roles.md and validated server-side.
